race.description: Barrier Reef Pools QTIS 3YO Maiden Plate
race.comment: HELLO DOLLY DIVA (7) missed a nose twice at Eagle Farm, the latest in an Open 3 and then was a little plainer beaten 2.4L in another Open 3 over 1625m at Toowoomba. KWT rides today, and reverting to Maiden grade, she's going to be very tough to beat. OUR MATE LOCKY (4) is racing well, and two back he was beaten a whisker over 1630m at Doomben. Draws inside, and can be right in the finish if the splits come. PRIZE WITNESS (10) peaks and is heading in the right direction. She has early speed and can manage an outside barrier. CRYPTION'S DESIRE (1) improved sharply at long odds, beaten 1.6L over 1400m at Eagle Farm. Finished it off well, and this trip should suit.
